label: 167_adaptation_climate finance_africa_climate
description: African countries seek increased climate financing to adapt to changing conditions. The focus is on turning political commitments into actionable plans at global conferences like COP27, with an emphasis on leveraging technology and inclusive development strategies.

earliest_articles.title: Prioritizing the Climate Change Agenda in Africa
earliest_articles.excerpt: Climate-related shocks have had a large impact on economies in sub-Saharan Africa. It is estimated that rainfall variability in Zambia will cost the country $4.3 billion in losses to GDP over 10 years. Sub-Saharan Africa has experienced some very extreme climate events in the past two years. The Africa region faces…
